title: vendor: use faster version instead compress/gzip
body:
use "github.com/klauspost/pgzip" instead of "compress/gzip".

some numbers:

```
## I am using a directory repository so to not depend on the network

# skopeo copy docker://tensorflow/tensorflow:latest dir:/var/tmp/tensorflow
# skopeo copy docker://fedora:latest dir:/var/tmp/fedora

## Each test is done with a fresh storage

## Before

# /usr/bin/time -v /usr/bin/skopeo copy dir:/var/tmp/tensorflow containers-storage:tensorflow
User time (seconds): 39.40
System time (seconds): 6.83
Percent of CPU this job got: 121%
Elapsed (wall clock) time (h:mm:ss or m:ss): 0:38.07
# /usr/bin/time -v /usr/bin/skopeo copy dir:/var/tmp/fedora containers-storage:fedora
User time (seconds): 8.32
System time (seconds): 1.62
Percent of CPU this job got: 128%
Elapsed (wall clock) time (h:mm:ss or m:ss): 0:07.72

## After

# /usr/bin/time -v ./skopeo copy dir:/var/tmp/tensorflow containers-storage:tensorflow
User time (seconds): 42.68
System time (seconds): 6.64
Percent of CPU this job got: 162%
Elapsed (wall clock) time (h:mm:ss or m:ss): 0:30.44
# /usr/bin/time -v ./skopeo copy dir:/var/tmp/tensorflow containers-storage:fedora
User time (seconds): 8.94
System time (seconds): 1.51
Percent of CPU this job got: 178%
Elapsed (wall clock) time (h:mm:ss or m:ss): 0:05.85
```

comments.body:
LGTM
@rhatdan, we need your Jedi power for merging.
